articleId.description: The ID of the Hacker News article to be returned

username.description: The Hacker News user to be returned

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

includeComments.description: Whether to include all the comments in a Hacker News article

keyword.description: The keyword for filtering the results of the query

tags.description: Tags for filtering the results of the query
